features.name: Appends learnings from new comments
features.description: Scans chat history, deduplicates user comments, and appends model output to a markdown file.

tests.name: writes fixture learnings
tests.command:
rm -f /tmp/traits-chat-learnings.md /tmp/.traits-chat-learnings.state.json && ./target/release/traits call sys.chat_learnings fixture-workspace 'Extract stable instructions only.' /tmp/traits-chat-learnings.md ./traits/sys/chat_protocols/fixtures/workspaceStorage all gpt-4o-mini '- remember the legacy json path
- store durable instructions in LEARNINGS.md' 2>/dev/null && cat /tmp/traits-chat-learnings.md

tests.name: second scan is incremental
tests.command: ./target/release/traits call sys.chat_learnings fixture-workspace 'Extract stable instructions only.' /tmp/traits-chat-learnings.md ./traits/sys/chat_protocols/fixtures/workspaceStorage all gpt-4o-mini '- should not be appended twice' 2>/dev/null
